creator: federicogalvezdurand@yahoo.com
text:
It only reverses using SUMA_MOTIF_GLXAREA as default.
I as far as I can see, it does not introduce any other regression regarding PR/113887.
Is it possible to have SUMA_MOTIF_GLXAREA optional in the Makefile?

Thank you for this very interesting tool.
Federico

----- Original Message ----
From: Jason Bacon <bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu>
To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.ORG
Cc: federicogalvezdurand@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, July 6, 2007 10:53:40 PM
Subject: Re: ports/114344: ports/science/afni broken


Thanks for the report, but the suggested patches  reverse the Xorg 7.2 
fixes I submitted as part of PR 113887.

I'll have to look into this after I've had a chance to update to the 
latest ports snapshot, and see if I can come up with a patch set that 
will work on all the recent snapshots I have running.

Regards,

    Jason


Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of science/afni,
>
> Please note that PR ports/114344 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114344
>
>
